description_long: This house features a modern, minimalist design with clean, rectangular volumes and a predominantly white exterior. The structure is composed of two main elongated blocks, with large windows and sliding glass doors that allow for ample natural light. There are multiple outdoor living spaces, including a covered patio area and a spacious terrace adjacent to a rectangular swimming pool. The flat roof and open layout emphasize contemporary architectural trends, while the use of pergolas and shaded walkways adds visual interest and functionality. The house appears to have two stories, with the upper level set back to create private balconies and shaded areas below. The overall aesthetic is sleek and functional, suitable for an upscale urban neighborhood.
description: A modern, two-story house with a white exterior, flat roof, large windows, and outdoor living spaces including a pool and terraces. The design is minimalist and contemporary, featuring clean lines and open layouts.
description_view_0: Front view showing the elongated facade, main entry, and covered patio area with pergola.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the swimming pool, terrace, and upper-level balconies.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the secondary entry, additional pergola, and the full length of the house.
description_view_3: Angled view from the other end, emphasizing the open terrace, shaded walkway, and the setback upper story.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a minimalist door, covered by a pergola with steps leading up, and a clean, open approach.
